record.field: KaraKeep (formerly Hoarder) is a self-hostable "bookmark everything" app that captures links, notes, images and PDFs and organizes them automatically with AI.

KaraKeep (formerly Hoarder) is a self-hostable "bookmark everything" app that captures links, notes, images and PDFs and organizes them automatically with AI.

It tackles link rot and information overload by saving full-page archives of the content you bookmark and tagging it automatically using either a hosted LLM or a local Ollama model. With full-text search, OCR, RSS auto-import and browser and mobile clients, it acts as a private, AI-assisted replacement for read-it-later services like Pocket. Built on a modern TypeScript stack and designed for self-hosting as a first-class concern.

Key features
  • Save links, notes, images and PDFs from browser extensions (Chrome, Firefox, Safari) and native iOS/Android apps
  • Automatic AI tagging and summarization via OpenAI-compatible APIs or fully local Ollama models
  • Full-page archival (HTML, screenshots, video via yt-dlp) to defeat link rot, plus OCR for searchable images
  • Fast full-text search powered by Meilisearch, with highlights, lists and bulk actions
  • RSS auto-import, automation rules, REST API and webhooks for integration
  • Shared lists, SSO and Docker-based self-hosting for privacy and control
Best for

Individuals and teams who want a private, self-hosted knowledge and bookmark hub: researchers, developers and power users replacing Pocket or browser bookmarks, and anyone needing AI-organized, archived, fully searchable collections of web content.

field.name: tag_ids
field.eval: [Command.set([ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_self_hosted'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_ai'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_productivity'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_search'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_notes'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_privacy'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_bookmarks')])]

record.field: services: web: image: ghcr.io/karakeep-app/karakeep:${KARAKEEP_VERSION:-release} restart: unless-stopped volumes: - ./data:/data environment: MEILI_ADDR: http://meilisearch:7700 BROWSER_WEB_URL: http://chrome:9222 DATA_DIR: /data NEXTAUTH_SECRET: your_secure_key container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:3000' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network chrome: image: gcr.io/zenika-hub/alpine-chrome:124 restart: unless-stopped command: - --no-sandbox - --disable-gpu - --disable-dev-shm-usage - --remote-debugging-address=0.0.0.0 - --remote-debugging-port=9222 - --hide-scrollbars container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_chrome' networks: - internal meilisearch: image: getmeili/meilisearch:v1.13.3 restart: unless-stopped environment: MEILI_NO_ANALYTICS: 'true' volumes: - ./meilisearch:/meili_data container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_meilisearch' networks: - internal networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true
